user.title: Set up Intelligent Light Control
user.description: Enter a name for this instance. Zones are managed via services afterwards.

update_zone.name: Update zone
update_zone.description: Updates the configuration of a zone.

set_zone_mode.name: Set zone mode
set_zone_mode.description: Sets the operating mode of a zone.

turn_on_zone.name: Turn on zone
turn_on_zone.description: Turns on the lights in a zone.

turn_off_zone.name: Turn off zone
turn_off_zone.description: Turns off the lights in a zone.

toggle_zone.name: Toggle zone
toggle_zone.description: Toggles the lights in a zone.

activate_scene.name: Activate scene
activate_scene.description: Activates a scene in a zone.

export_config.name: Export config
export_config.description: Exports the configuration of all zones.
